dialogue_text: I have lost much flesh since I lived there, and now I am anxious for a chance to show the other beasts how courageous I have grown.
source_excerpt: "City life does not agree with me at all," remarked the Lion, as they walked along at a brisk pace. "I have lost much flesh since I lived there, and now I am anxious for a chance to show the other beasts how courageous I have grown."
